name: Cursed be thy Words
description:
Ahhhwww, by entering the room you take a big wiff of clean, nice air...  Of
course, if it wasn't by the blood stench, comming from the walls...  The whole
room is surrounded by streched skin, apparently of living beings, or what was
left of those.  Among random pairs of streched skin there is messages writen,
or encarved, which is the word that i believe mostly describe it, messages on
blood.
